body_p1: In 2003, I raised my right hand and committed to something larger than myself. From the moment I walked into service, I was determined to be exceptional at it.
body_p2: I trained as a Mission Crew Commander — one of the most demanding intelligence and electronic warfare roles in the Air Force. My aircraft was the EC-130H Compass Call, a highly classified Electronic Attack platform so specialized that only a handful of people in the world ever fly aboard it.
body_p3: Onboard, I was the Chief. Nine crew members. Every decision from wheels-up to wheels-down.
